prompt: I'm building a dashboard to monitor our support bot's performance daily. I need to analyze a fresh batch of call data and get metrics like: what percentage are negative sentiment? How many calls are actually getting resolved? What's the CSAT distribution? Which issues should I focus on first? Please provide Excel output that I can ingest into my dashboard.

assertions.name: structured-for-ingestion
assertions.description: Excel format suitable for dashboard/BI tool ingestion

assertions.name: kpi-summary-sheet
assertions.description: Summary Statistics sheet provides key metrics for dashboard headers

assertions.name: issue-prioritization-data
assertions.description: Issue Type Analysis shows which issues to focus on first (sorted by impact)
